name: clean-up-medialightbox-edit-20260414-1623
idea:
Clean up MediaLightbox edit panel in reigh-app across 4 phases:

Phase 1 (stop the bleeding — fixes user's 'can't type in edit textbox' bug):
1. Fix reigh-app/src/domains/lora/components/LoraSelectorModal/LoraSelectorModal.tsx:67-69 — remove 'if (!isOpen) return null' early-return before <Dialog open={isOpen}>. Base UI Dialog cleanup doesn't run when component unmounts while open={true}, leaving body pointer-events:none and focus scope stuck — which is why the textarea can't be typed in and the model Select closes instantly when opened. If children are heavy, gate <DialogContent> instead of the whole Dialog.
2. Same fix in reigh-app/src/shared/components/PhaseConfigSelectorModal/PhaseConfigSelectorModal.tsx.
3. Add guard comment at top of reigh-app/src/shared/components/ui/dialog.tsx explaining the rule.
4. Make useImageEditFormSafe in reigh-app/src/domains/media-lightbox/contexts/ImageEditFormContext.tsx fail loud: rename current to useImageEditForm (throws when provider missing); keep a separately-named useImageEditFormSafe returning EMPTY_FORM for explicit opt-in callers. EMPTY_FORM's no-op setters silently drop typing if context is missing — same bug class.

Phase 2 (decouple edit panel):
5. Split reigh-app/src/domains/media-lightbox/components/EditModePanel.tsx (490 lines) by mode into <TextEditPanel>, <InpaintPanel>, <AnnotatePanel>, <RepositionPanel>, <Img2ImgPanel>, <UpscalePanel>. Root EditModePanel becomes a thin router. Eliminate the IIFE-in-JSX blocks at lines 185, 253, 319.
6. Collapse the props-vs-context hybrid: pick ONE source. Either wrap InlineEditView in a real ImageEditProvider and delete stateOverrides, or go pure-props and remove context reads.
7. Flatten setter re-wrapping in reigh-app/src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/useInpainting.ts:117-123 — remove 'incomingSet ?? fallbackSet' fallback. Persistence owns the prompt; everyone else reads/writes directly.

Phase 3 (architectural debt):
8. Stop persisting the prompt field to Supabase on every keystroke. Persist on blur, on generate, or on lightbox close. Other fields (sliders/toggles) stay debounced — they don't race with user typing. This lets us delete most of reigh-app/src/shared/settings/hooks/useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts's pending-ref + edit-version machinery, which exists purely to work around the per-keystroke DB write race.
9. With #8 done, consolidate useAutoSaveSettings entity-change coordination. Right now useEditSettingsPersistence.ts:110-114 mutates refs during render, applyEntityChangeState in autoSaveSettingsHelpers.ts calls setSettings during render, and useCustomModeLoad loads in an effect — three places deciding 'what should state be for this entity.' A useReducer for (entityId, status, settings) atomicizes the transition.

Phase 4 (prevent regressions):
10. Add ESLint rule (or at minimum a documented check) for the pattern 'if (!open|!isOpen) return null' followed by a <Dialog> render.
11. Document the no-op-default-context antipattern somewhere visible (likely reigh-app/CLAUDE.md or a structure_detail doc).

Context:
- reigh-app React frontend inside monorepo at /Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace. CLAUDE.md at reigh-app/CLAUDE.md.
- Uses Base UI (@base-ui/react), not Radix.
- Persistence: useAutoSaveSettings → useGenerationEditSettings → Supabase generations.params.ui.editSettings.
- User-confirmed symptoms: sometimes textarea won't accept keystrokes AND model Select closes instantly when opened — both point to stuck focus trap from LoRA modal unmount-while-open bug.
- Light megaplan — ship incrementally, Phase 1 first as standalone PR so user can measure whether later phases are still worth doing.
- Tests exist (EditModePanel adjacent __tests__, useAutoSaveSettings); preserve behavior, update tests as needed.
- Repo conventions per CLAUDE.md: prefer editing existing files; don't create new .md docs unless explicitly requested; toasts errors-only; no hardcoded colors; never 'npx supabase db reset --linked'.
